publishedAbstract: - Heketi pod is not able to capture logs, throwing below error ~~~ # oc logs failed to open log file "/var/log/pods/3e16fd31-95e9-11ea-861d-000d3aa32fXX/heketi_197.log": open /var/log/pods/3e16fd31-95e9-11ea-861d-000d3aa32XX/heketi_197.log: no such file or directory ~~~
publishedTitle: Heketi pod is not able to generate logs
